name: Orange Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup unsalted butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Butter baking sheets.
3. In a bowl of melted butter and water. Add sugar, egg yolk, orange peel, olive oil, rum, orange extract, and salt.
4. Gradually incorporate the flour mixture into the well until smooth.
5. Wrap dough in a floured towel and refrigerate for 2 hours.
6. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch on a lightly floured surface.
7. Cut into 2 x 4 inch strips using a scalloped pastry wheel.
8. Place cookies on prepared sheets, spacing them about 1/2 inch apart.
9. Pierce each cookie several times with fork tines.
10. Brush egg glaze over the cookies and bake until light brown, about 25 minutes.
11. Brush remaining melted butter over hot cookies and sprinkle with sugar.
12. Return to oven for an additional 5 minutes.
13. Cool completely on a rack.
14. Store in an airtight container.
